Home / Services / Drainage Solutions

Drainage Solutions

Protect your property with expert drainage solutions.

Kansas City's weather can be tough on properties, especially with heavy rains and freeze-thaw cycles. Jake's Fencing & Excavating provides expert drainage solutions to protect your property from water damage. We assess your property's drainage issues and design customized solutions to effectively manage water runoff. Our services include French drain installation, culvert installation, and grading to improve water flow away from your foundation. We understand the importance of proper drainage for preventing foundation damage, basement flooding, and soil erosion. Our experienced team uses high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting results. We work closely with our clients to understand their specific needs and provide drainage solutions that are both effective and aesthetically pleasing. Whether you're dealing with standing water in your yard, a wet basement, or erosion problems, we can help you protect your property with our reliable drainage solutions.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Comprehensive Site Assessment
  2. 02 Step 2: Customized Drainage Plan Design
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional Installation and Grading
  4. 04 Step 4: Final Inspection and Water Flow Testing

Benefits

  • Prevent Foundation Damage
  • Eliminate Standing Water
  • Reduce Soil Erosion
  • Protect Landscaping

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the signs of poor drainage?

Signs of poor drainage include standing water in your yard, a wet basement, soil erosion, and foundation cracks.

What is a French drain?

A French drain is a trench filled with gravel or rock that contains a perforated pipe to redirect surface and groundwater away from an area.

How much does drainage correction cost?

The cost of drainage correction depends on the severity of the problem and the type of solution required. We provide free estimates after assessing your property.

Get a Free Estimate
